app.title: Rock, Paper, Scissors, Lizard, Spock
home.subtitle: Tournament mode
opponent.label: Opponent
opponent.subtitle: Tournament challenger
opponent.archetype.rookieBluffer.label: Rookie Bluffer
opponent.archetype.rookieBluffer.persona: Bold opener with fast pressure and risky swings.
opponent.archetype.rookieBluffer.flavor: Starts hot, shifts tempo often, leaves punish windows.
opponent.archetype.patternHunter.label: Pattern Hunter
opponent.archetype.signalReader.label: Signal Reader
opponent.archetype.signalReader.personal: Calm rhythm reader with quick correction.
opponent.archetype.signalReader.flavor: Uses recent rounds to bias counter choices.
opponent.archetype.momentumBreaker.label: Momentum Breaker
opponent.archetype.momentumBreaker.perso: Disciplined control player that targets streaks.
opponent.archetype.momentumBreaker.flavo: Gets sharper against active win streaks.
opponent.archetype.wildCard.label: Wild Card
opponent.archetype.wildCard.flavor: High variance mix of expected and offbeat moves.
opponent.archetype.grandmaster.label: Grandmaster
opponent.archetype.grandmaster.personali: Composed finisher built for late-round pressure.
opponent.archetype.grandmaster.flavor: High adaptation, low mistakes, focused favorites.
opponent.intro.rookieBluffer.0: Fast opener with bold risks who tries to force your tempo.
opponent.intro.rookieBluffer.1: Switches pace quickly and keeps probing for easy reads.
opponent.intro.rookieBluffer.2: Early pressure is strong, but patient play can break it.
opponent.intro.patternHunter.0: Watches your patterns and punishes repeated habits.
opponent.intro.patternHunter.1: The more predictable you are, the stronger this opponent gets.
opponent.intro.patternHunter.2: Deliberate variation is your best counter tool.
opponent.intro.signalReader.0: Reads short-term rhythm and responds with targeted counters.
opponent.intro.signalReader.1: Adjusts quickly after each reveal and avoids repeat mistakes.
opponent.intro.signalReader.2: Intentional tempo breaks can interrupt the read cycle.
opponent.intro.momentumBreaker.0: Built to stop streaks, especially in key rounds.
opponent.intro.momentumBreaker.1: When you gain momentum, expect harder counter pressure.
opponent.intro.momentumBreaker.2: A steady pace often outperforms flashy traps here.
opponent.intro.wildCard.0: Uses chaotic choices to break your comfort loop.
opponent.intro.wildCard.1: Hard to read because pattern noise is intentional.
opponent.intro.wildCard.2: Solid fundamentals beat over-engineered mind games.
opponent.intro.grandmaster.0: Final-round specialist: calm, precise, and highly adaptive.
opponent.intro.grandmaster.1: Leaves few mistakes, so rhythm control matters most.
opponent.intro.grandmaster.2: Most dangerous after learning your habits in later rounds.
match.tournamentLost: You were eliminated from the tournament.
match.nextOpponentHint: {name} is waiting in the next match. Win {wins} rounds to keep advancing.
match.dailyRewardReadyHint: Today's challenge is cleared. Claim the reward now, then roll straight into a standard run if you want more.
match.dailyCompletedHint: Today's daily is done. If you want to keep momentum, jump into a standard tournament next.
match.dailyTryTomorrowHint: The daily run is closed for today. A fresh challenge arrives tomorrow, and a standard tournament is still open now.
match.tournamentWinHint: Strong run. Start another tournament and see if you can clear the bracket even faster.
match.tournamentLossHint: This run ended here, but the next bracket is one tap away.
match.survivalContinueHint: Current run score: {score}. Beat the next challenger to keep climbing.
match.survivalLossHint: Final score: {score}. Opponents defeated: {opponents}. Start a new run and push higher.
share.error: Could not share result right now.
leaderboard.title: Leaderboard
bracket.title: Tournament bracket
bracket.summaryText: Current state of the advancement tree.
bracket.summaryEmpty: There is no active tournament yet.
rules.label: Rules
rules.title: Game rules
rules.intro: The following rules determine which hand sign defeats another.
rules.basic1: Each sign defeats two other signs.
rules.basic2: If both sides choose the same sign, the result is a draw.
rules.basic3: The match lasts until the selected win target is reached.
stats.title: My Stats
daily.title: Daily Challenge
daily.headline: One fixed bracket. One shot today.
daily.description: The same seeded challenge is offered all day. Finish it before midnight and come back tomorrow for a new bracket.
daily.resultLost: Today's challenge is over. A new one unlocks tomorrow.
game.resumeFailed: Saved progress could not be restored. A new tournament has been started.
error.fallbackMessage: The game hit an unexpected error. You can restart safely.
mission.title: Daily Missions
tutorial.label: Game tutorial
tutorial.step0.title: Welcome to RPSLS Tournament
tutorial.step0.body: A fast tournament-style game where you defeat 3 or 7 opponents in a row. Each match is best-of-3 or best-of-5.
tutorial.step1.title: 5 hand signs
tutorial.step1.body: Rock, Paper, Scissors, Lizard, Spock — each sign defeats exactly two others and loses to two others.
tutorial.step2.title: How to win a match
tutorial.step2.body: Pick your sign before the countdown ends. Reach the win target first to defeat your opponent and advance.
tutorial.step3.title: Daily Challenge
tutorial.step3.body: A new seeded tournament unlocks every day. Complete it before midnight to earn a reward!
tutorial.step4.title: You’re ready!
tutorial.step4.body: Good luck — and may the best hand sign win.
